videos.title: Infinite Web-Slinging = Infinite Tokens, Mana and Power! | Much Abrew
videos.description:
Maybe the problem with web-slinging is we just aren't doing it enough...

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/much-abrew-web-slinging-but-infinite-standard
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7371206#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/P8yOn
